Hardware Component File

CAN 2.1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference CAN_2.1.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 250000
Send ID 00
Receive ID 00
Functional Addr 00
Functional Name CAN

ACC_Base I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 0265
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items

Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
